topic: South Korea 2-1 Czechia — World Cup 2026 Group A opener comeback (supersub Oh Hyeon-gyu wins it)

hook.spoken_hook: Korea took Son Heung-min off. His replacement stole the show.

scenes.voiceover: Korea took Son Heung-min off. His replacement stole the show.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient accent #F7D774 to #C8881B, bold white condensed type 'SON CAME OFF…', a faint stadium silhouette, premium broadcast feel, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Czechia drew first blood. Ladislav Krejčí rose to head in a long Coufal throw. One-nil.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Tense deep-red and black graphic, a bold white condensed 'KREJČÍ 59' header from a long throw', a header silhouette, no real faces, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Then Hwang In-beom answered. A drop of the shoulder, a clever chip, and Korea were level.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient accent, bold white condensed 'HWANG IN-BEOM EQUALISES 67', a chipped-finish arc graphic, premium broadcast feel, no real faces, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Czechia thought they'd retaken the lead. Souček headed in, but it was ruled out for offside. Replays said the call was right.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Tense deep-red and black graphic, a bold white condensed 'DISALLOWED — OFFSIDE 77', a VAR offside-line motif, no real faces, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: There's your answer. Oh Hyeon-gyu — the man on for Son — taps in Hwang In-beom's cross. Two-one Korea.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Explosive gold-and-black celebration graphic, bold white condensed 'SUPERSUB 2-1', a substitution-board motif with the number entering, confetti energy, no real faces, vertical 9:16.

scenes.on_screen_text: THEN THE SAVE TO WIN IT
scenes.voiceover: And in stoppage time, Kim Seung-gyu flew to his right to keep it. A clutch save to seal the comeback.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient accent, bold white condensed 'CLUTCH SAVE 93', a goalkeeper-dive silhouette, premium broadcast feel, no real faces, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Comeback complete, Korea are up and running. Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Brand end card, deep black, gold TT monogram top-center, bold white condensed 'DAILY WORLD CUP', a hand-drawn gold arrow pointing down, vertical 9:16.

comment_bait: Souček's goal — correct offside call, or did Czechia get robbed? Drop your verdict below 🇨🇿
cta: Subscribe for your daily World Cup story
music_mood: Tense build into a triumphant, surging comeback anthem; a gut-punch dip on the disallowed-goal beat

thumbnail.concept: Son Heung-min's face (real CC photo) large on the right, intense/uncertain expression, South Korea red wash, bold gold 'SON OFF —' over a white 'THEN THIS?' on the left, deep black + gold, a faint 2-1 scoreboard hint in a corner, premium broadcast feel, vertical 9:16.

youtube_title: Son Came Off — Then His Replacement Won It | South Korea 2-1 Czechia (World Cup 2026)
youtube_description: Korea subbed off captain Son Heung-min — and the man who replaced him won the game. South Korea came from behind to beat Czechia 2-1 in their World Cup 2026 Group A opener at Estadio Akron: Ladislav Krejci headed Czechia ahead, Hwang In-beom levelled with a slick chip, Tomas Soucek had a header ruled out for offside, supersub Oh Hyeon-gyu finished it, and Kim Seung-gyu's clutch late save sealed it. Correct offside call, or were Czechia robbed? Your daily World Cup story — subscribe. #worldcup2026 #southkorea
instagram_caption: Korea took Son OFF… and his replacement won it 🇰🇷 Hwang In-beom's chip levelled it, Soucek's header got chalked off for offside, then supersub Oh Hyeon-gyu — on for Son — won it, before Kim Seung-gyu's clutch save sealed the comeback. Correct offside call, or were Czechia robbed? Subscribe for your daily World Cup story.
tiktok_caption: They subbed off Son… then his replacement won it 🇰🇷 Chip to level, a goal chalked off for offside, supersub winner + a clutch keeper save. Robbed or correct call? Daily World Cup content 👇
